mapper.select: SELECT t.*, tt.name AS type_name, ts.name AS status_name, u.real_name AS creator_name, c.name AS college_name FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN ticket_type tt ON t.type_id = tt.id LEFT JOIN ticket_status ts ON t.status_id = ts.id LEFT JOIN user u ON t.creator_id = u.id LEFT JOIN college c ON t.college_id = c.id WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket (title, content, type_id, status_id, urgency, images, creator_id, college_id, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{typeId}, #{statusId}, #{urgency}, #{images}, #{creatorId}, #{collegeId}, #{isDeleted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ticket SET status_id = #{statusId}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT tt.name AS type_name, COUNT(t.id) AS count FROM ticket t JOIN ticket_type tt ON t.type_id = tt.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.type_id, tt.name
SELECT ts.name AS status_name, COUNT(t.id) AS count FROM ticket t JOIN ticket_status ts ON t.status_id = ts.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.status_id, ts.name
SELECT urgency, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ticket WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY urgency

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN te.satisfaction = 'SATISFIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS satisfied_count, SUM(CASE WHEN te.satisfaction = 'DISSATISFIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dissatisfied_count, SUM(CASE WHEN te.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unevaluated_count FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN ticket_evaluation te ON t.id = te.ticket_id WHERE t.is_deleted = 0

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ts.name = '已完结' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ts.name NOT IN ('已完结', '已关闭') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS incomplete_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ts.name = '已关闭' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed_count FROM ticket t JOIN ticket_status ts ON t.status_id = ts.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket WHERE is_deleted = 0
